title: Scholastic
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
[[File:Scholastic.svg|thumb|300px|Scholastic logo]]
The '''Scholastic Corporation''', formerly '''Scholastic Inc.''', or simply '''Scholastic''' is a publishing company that publishes children's books. They have published many [[Lucasfilm]]-licensed ''[[Star Wars]]'' books for younger readers.

==Books==
*''[[Star Wars Journal: Queen Amidala]]''
*''[[Star Wars Journal: Anakin Skywalker]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Adventures in Hyperspace]]'' series
*[[Boba Fett (books)|Boba Fett]] series
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures (Scholastic)|Star Wars: Episode I Adventures]]
*[[Jedi Apprentice]] series
*[[Star Wars: Jedi Quest (novel series)|Jedi Quest]] series
*[[Star Wars: The Last of the Jedi]] series
*[[Star Wars: Rebel Force]] series
*[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|Star Wars Adventures]]
*''[[Star Wars The Clone Wars: Secrets Revealed in 3-D]]''
*[[Star Wars Junior]] series
*[[Star Wars Missions]]
*[[Star Wars Science Adventures]] series
*''[[The Rise and Fall of Darth Vader]]''
*''[[The Life and Legend of Obi-Wan Kenobi]]''
*''[[The Star Wars Storybook]]''

*''[[The Empire Strikes Back: A Storybook]]''

*''[[Princess Leia: Royal Rebel]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Spaceships]]''
*''[[Star Wars: A Very Vader Valentine's Day]]''
*[[The Wrath of Darth Maul|''Star Wars: The Wrath of Darth Maul'']]
